description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in green from kiara. Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the quilted leather effect fabric and plait embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit. Height: 25 cm Width: 32 cm Depth: 13 cm Made of leatherette for durability Quilted with heart and flower pattern for high-fashion style Has two main zipped compartments, one with internal zipped pocket, one with organiser pockets Two handles attached to the bag with plaited loops, alternate long strap provided One pocket on front fastened with strap and magnet fastening Three zippered pockets on the front One zipped pocket at the back for additional space Two pockets on sides with magnetic fastening Metal stud feet on base Round metal zip pulls for style and ease of use Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
